revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:1 nguŏk 1 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[hak:1-ngie̍t 1-ngit (nùng-la̍k)]][[ja:1月1日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 1월 1일]][[wuu:正月初一]][[za:Ndwencieng ngoenz co'it]][[zh-classical:正月初一]][[zh-min-nan:1 goe̍h 1 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:正月初一]][[zh:正月初一]]
{{Not to be confused with|January 1|qq=January 1}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=一月初一|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 1월 1일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar January|qq=}} '''January 1''' is the 1st day of month {{ill|Zhengyue|en|Zhengyue|qid=Q1072983|lt=January (Mutsuki)|1=Zhengyue}} the 1st month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|qid=Q96759839|1=senshū}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}} . == Events == * {{ill|Kōhei|en|Kōhei|qid=Q1193572|lt=Kōhei|1=Kōhei}} 5th Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1062|en|1062|qid=Q19396|lt=1062|1=1062}} {{ill|October 22|en|October 22|qid=Q2957|lt=October 22|1=October 22}} ) – The {{ill|Former Nine Years' War|en|Former Nine Years' War|qid=Q1187448|lt=Former Nine Years' War|1=Former Nine Years' War}} concluded{{Citation needed|date=2021-04|qq=}} . {{ill|Minamoto no Yoriyoshi|en|Minamoto no Yoriyoshi|qid=Q3082851|lt=Minamoto Yoriyoshi|1=Minamoto no Yoriyoshi}} defeated {{ill|Abe no Sadato|en|Abe no Sadato|qid=Q3616500|lt=Abe Sadanari|1=Abe no Sadato}} at the {{ill|Chugawa Barrier|ja|厨川柵|lt=Chugawa Barrier|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chugawa Barrier|1=Kuriyagawa Palisade|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11410106}} . * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} 1st Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1868|en|1868|qid=Q7717|lt=1868|1=1868}} {{ill|November 1|en|November 1|qid=Q2997|lt=November 1|1=November 1}} ) – Japan’s first Western-style {{ill|Lighthouse|en|Lighthouse|qid=Q39715|lt=lighthouse|1=Lighthouse}} began construction at {{ill|Cape Kannon|en|Cape Kannon|qid=Q11630643|lt=Kannonzaki|1=Cape Kannon}} .
== Births == * {{ill|Enpō|en|Enpō|qid=Q1145735|lt=Empō|1=Enpō}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1675|en|1675|qid=Q7624|lt=1675|1=1675}} {{ill|November 4|en|November 4|qid=Q2994|lt=November 4|1=November 4}} ) – {{ill|Shimazu Yoshitaka|ja|島津吉貴|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimazu Yoshitaka|1=Shimazu Yoshitaka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11246537}} , the 4th lord of the {{ill|Satsuma Domain|en|Satsuma Domain|qid=Q676187|lt=Satsuma Domain|1=Satsuma Domain}} (died {{ill|1747|en|1747|qid=Q7596|lt=1747|1=1747}} ). * {{ill|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|qid=Q1325001|ja|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|qid=Q1325001|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genroku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1325001}} 2nd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1689|en|1689|qid=Q7674|lt=1689|1=1689}} {{ill|October 29|en|October 29|qid=Q2951|lt=October 29|1=October 29}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Yoshimichi|en|Tokugawa Yoshimichi|qid=Q843299|lt=Tokugawa Yoshi-michi|1=Tokugawa Yoshimichi}} , the 4th lord of the {{ill|Owari Domain|en|Owari Domain|qid=Q1062072|lt=Owari Domain|1=Owari Domain}} (died {{ill|1713|en|1713|qid=Q6873|lt=1713|1=1713}} ). * {{ill|Keiō|en|Keiō|qid=Q776775|lt=Keiō|1=Keiō}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1867|en|1867|qid=Q7715|lt=1867|1=1867}} {{ill|October 14|en|October 14|qid=Q2922|lt=October 14|1=October 14}} ) – {{ill|Masaoka Shiki|en|Masaoka Shiki|qid=Q315152|lt=Masaoka Shiki|1=Masaoka Shiki}} , a {{ill|haiku poet|ja|Haiku Poet|1=haiku poet|2=ja|3=俳句詩人|1=Haiku Poet|2=ja|3=俳句詩人|qid=Q135490197|lt=haiku poet|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/haiku poet|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and {{ill|waka poet|ja|歌人|lt=waka poet|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/waka poet|qq=}} (died {{ill|1902|en|1902|qid=Q2043|lt=1902|1=1902}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|qid=Q1328185|lt=Keichō|1=Keichō}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1600|en|1600|qid=Q6720|lt=1600|1=1600}} {{ill|October 23|en|October 23|qid=Q2958|lt=October 23|1=October 23}} ) – {{ill|Ishida Masatsugu|en|Ishida Masatsugu|qid=Q6080154|lt=Ishida Masatsugu|1=Ishida Masatsugu}} , a {{ill|sengoku military commander|ja|武将|lt=sengoku military commander|lt_ja=戦国武将|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/sengoku military commander|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11545923}} (birth year unknown).
== Commemorations == * {{ill|Kannamesai Festival|en|Kannamesai Festival|qid=Q11255045|lt=Kannamesai|1=Kannamesai Festival}} (Moved to {{ill|October 17|en|October 17|qid=Q2962|lt=October 17|1=October 17}} after the adoption of the New Calendar)
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|12|30|1|2|12|1|2|1|0101|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}
